The '''Advanced Project ship''' was a prototype model of the [[Twin Ion Engine starfighter|T.I.E. starfighter]] designed by [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]].<ref name="RP" />

==Characteristics==
The Advanced Project ship's role was to escort [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] for corporate clients. They could deploy into combat from tight-packed launch stacks in standard cargo holds. Advanced Project ships did not have the blade-shaped forward hull of the [[Scimitar/Legends|''Scimitar'']], only a compact, spherical compartment, and had broad vertical cooling vanes at either end of a twenty-meter wingspan. It had essentially the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE's]] signature look, but was painted black and was noted as being smaller than previous models.<ref name="RP" />

==History==
Ships of the latest and smallest experimental model were finishing construction by [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. They were paid for in advance by Sienar's clients, one of which was the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].<ref name="RP" />

The design of the Advanced Project ship would be expanded upon with the [[Twin Ion Engine starfighter|T.I.E. starfighter]] and its successor designs.<ref name="TSWS">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
